QueryTheListOfSharedTrafficPackages.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryTheListOfSharedTrafficPackages.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000, default is 1000
QueryTheListOfSharedTrafficPackages.id: The ID of the shared traffic package to query
QueryTheListOfSharedTrafficPackages.status: The status of the shared traffic package to query: "RUNNING" in use; "EXPIRED" expired; "USED_UP" exhausted
QueryTheListOfSharedTrafficPackages.deductPolicy: The deduction policy of the shared traffic package to query: "FullTimeDurationPackage" full-time; "TimeDurationPackage" off-peak
